functions.label: createMockFavoritesClient
description:
Creates a stateful mock favorites client implementing the full
`FavoritesClientPublic` interface. Add/remove operations mutate
an in-memory set so Storybook interactions are reflected immediately.

functions.label: createMockFindItems
description: Create a mock findItems function for testing
signature: <T>) => ({ searchQuery, filters, sort, page, }: { searchQuery?: string | undefined; filters: MockFindItemsFilters; sort: { field: string; direction: "asc" | "desc"; }; page: { index: number; size: number; }; }) => Promise<{ items: T[]; total: number; }>

functions.label: createSimpleMockFindItems

children.label: delay
description: - Optional delay in milliseconds to simulate network latency.

functions.label: extractTagIds
description:
Extracts tag IDs from a `UserContentCommonSchema` item's `references` array.

Mock items store tags as `{ type: 'tag', id: 'tag-id' }` references. This
helper converts them into a flat `string[]` suitable for `ContentListItem.tags`.

interfaces.label: DashboardMockItem
description:
Mock dashboard item matching the real DashboardSavedObjectUserContent type from
`src/platform/plugins/shared/dashboard/public/dashboard_listing/types.ts`

children.label: attributes
signature: { title: string; description?: string | undefined; timeRestore: boolean; }

children.label: canFavorite
description: Dashboards can be favorited

interfaces.label: FileMockItem
description:
Mock file item for testing custom content types.
Files don't have an existing TableListView implementation in Kibana,
so this serves as an example of custom content type attributes.

children.label: attributes
signature: { title: string; description?: string | undefined; size: number; extension: string; mimeType: string; fileKind: string; }

interfaces.label: ItemWithStatus
description:
Dashboard item with status field for the Customization story.
Extends UserContentCommonSchema with dashboard-specific fields.

children.label: attributes
signature: { title: string; description?: string | undefined; timeRestore: boolean; }

children.label: canFavorite
description: Dashboards can be favorited

interfaces.label: MapMockItem
description:
Mock map item matching the real MapUserContent type from

children.label: attributes
signature: { title: string; description?: string | undefined; layerListJSON?: string | undefined; }

interfaces.label: MockFindItemsConfig
description: Configuration for creating a mock findItems function

children.label: items
description: The source array of mock items.

children.label: delay
description: Optional delay in milliseconds to simulate network latency.

children.label: statusSortFn
description: Optional function to handle status field sorting.
signature: ((a: T, b: T, direction: "asc" | "desc") => number) | undefined

children.label: favoritesClient
description:
Favorites client instance used to resolve starred-item filtering.

Defaults to the module-level {@link mockFavoritesClient} singleton.
Pass a story-specific client to ensure the same instance is shared
between the provider (`services.favorites`) and `findItems`, so that
starred items are immediately visible when the `starred` filter is toggled.

interfaces.label: VisualizationMockItem
description:
Mock visualization item matching the real VisualizeUserContent type from
`src/platform/plugins/shared/visualizations/public/visualize_app/components/visualize_listing.tsx`

children.label: attributes
signature: { id: string; title: string; description?: string | undefined; visType:
; typeTitle?: string | undefined; icon?: string | undefined; readOnly?: boolean | undefined; error?: string | undefined; }

children.label: editor
signature: { editUrl?: string | undefined; editApp?: string | undefined; } | undefined

objects.label: mockContentListUserProfilesServices
description:
Mock `ContentListUserProfilesServices` for content list provider.

Provides `bulkResolve` backed by the static `MOCK_USER_PROFILES` data.

objects.label: mockFavoritesClient
description:
Pre-built mock favorites client for testing starred filtering in stories.
Stateful — add/remove calls persist within the current session.

objects.label: mockTagsService
description:
Pre-configured mock tags service backed by {@link MOCK_TAGS}.

Provides `getTagList` and `parseSearchQuery` ready for use as
`services.tags` on `ContentListProvider`.

description: Tag mock data wrapped in search response format
